enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief life update covering a YouTube upload glitch, a DMV visit to sort out a duplicate driver's license situation, riding his motorcycle to work for the first time, and receiving a shipment of 1,000 crickets (presumably for a reptile) along with new cricket keepers.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoyed riding to work, found it fun
frustrated but uncertain if video will go through

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He tried to upload a vlog yesterday but couldn't because YouTube insisted it had already been uploaded.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He changed the name of the file on his computer and tried to upload it again, but it still didn't work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hopes he's not stuck in a difficult situation with uploading the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He went to the DMV to get another driver's license because he thought he lost one, ordered a new one, found the original, and then lost the new one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He rode his motorcycle to work for the first time yesterday and found it fun because it was a far distance.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He rode his bike to work today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He bought a thousand crickets from a company he can't remember.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He divided the crickets into two big cricket keepers and enjoys watching them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He's unsure if he'll be able to upload the video and doesn't want to talk much because of that uncertainty.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder vlog with me, Kyle Pounds. This is for the 21st. I tried to upload one yesterday.
Well, I didn't upload one yesterday because I tried to upload a vlog yesterday, but my computer insisted, YouTube insisted that it had already been uploaded.
So I changed the name of the file on my computer and I tried to upload it again and it's like, fuck you, already been uploaded.
So I guess I couldn't upload my, and hopefully it'll allow me to upload this video.
I mean, I hope I'm not between a rock and a hard place on this.
If this doesn't work, maybe I could try to upload it with the other video camera.
So anyways, what I did yesterday, I went into the DMV to get another driver's license because I had the wrong driver's license.
I thought I'd lost one and then I ordered a new one and then I found my original one and then somehow I lost the new one.
And the other one was supposed to be voided, so I went in there and ordered another one.
Yesterday, I rode my motorcycle to work for the first time.
That was pretty fun because it was far away.
I figured it'd be a good day to do that.
I'm going to ride to work today on my bike, though.
Got a thousand crickets and only they sold it to me, right?
I can't remember the company, but Nutfluck or somebody who told me on YouTube and got a thousand big ones.
I had to buy two more of those big cricket keepers.
And now there's a bunch of crickets in there with my geikos.
A bunch of little crickets, big crickets.
I think they like it.
It makes it exciting.
They get to watch them and stuff.
Yeah, so anyways, that's that.
Hopefully I'll be able to upload it.
I don't want to talk too much because I'm not sure I can even upload this video.
All right, peace out.
I'll be able to upload it.
